ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie in its original language */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Brief overview or synopsis of the movie */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie in USD */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie in USD */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the movie (e.g., Released, In Production) */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or marketing slogan for the movie */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb identifier for the movie */,
  "adult" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the movie is for adults */,
  "belongs_to_collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection the movie belongs to */,
  "original_language" TEXT /* Original language of the movie */,
  "spoken_languages" TEXT /* Spoken languages in the movie (JSON format) */,
  "video" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the movie has a video */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes or ratings for the movie */,
  "production_companies" TEXT /* JSON array of production companies involved */,
  "production_countries" TEXT /* JSON array of countries where the movie was produced */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "screenplay_writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the screenplay writer */,
  "cast_ids" TEXT /* JSON array of main cast member IDs */,
  "poster_path" TEXT /* Path to the movie poster */,
  "backdrop_path" TEXT /* Path to the backdrop image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the movie metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the movie record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the movie record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_belongs_to_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("belongs_to_collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_screenplay_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("screenplay_writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the collection */,
  "poster_path" TEXT /* Path to the collection poster */,
  "backdrop_path" TEXT /* Path to the collection backdrop */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the collection record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the collection record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the genre record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the genre record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "iso_639_1" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code of the language */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the language */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the language record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the language record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_spoken_languages" (
  "movie_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-language relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_spoken_languages_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_spoken_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the director */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the director record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the director record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screenplay writer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the screenplay writer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the screenplay writer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the screenplay writer */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the screenplay writer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the writer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the writer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the actor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the actor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the actor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-director relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_writers" (
  "movie_writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-writer relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the screenplay writer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_writers_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_writers_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-actor relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role played by the actor in the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)
